title: Bostik Handy Hot Melt Glue Sticks Pack of 14 - For Use with Bostik Handy Hot Melt Glue Gun
features: Glue sticks designed for use with the Bostik Handy Hot Melt Glue Gun
Rapid setting, Form an ultra-strong, long-lasting bond
Ideal for hobbies, crafts and household repairs
Suitable materials: Most household materials including ceramics, wood, leather, fabric and metal
Contents: 1x Bostik Handy Hot Melt Glue Sticks, For Use With Bostik Handy Hot Melt Glue Gun, Pack of 14
description: From the manufacturer Bostik Handy Hot Melt Glue Sticks For use with Bostik Handy Hot Melt Glue Gun Designed for use with the Bostik Handy Hot Melt Glue Gun, these glue sticks are ideal for hobbies, crafts and light household repairs. Clean and easy to use, these glue sticks set rapidly to form an ultra strong, long-lasting bond. Suitable materials When used with the Bostik Handy Hot Melt Glue Gun, these glue sticks will bond most household materials including ceramics, wood, leather, fabric, and metal. Advantages at a glance Glue sticks for Bostik Handy Hot Melt Glue Gun For hobbies, crafts or minor household repairs Ultra strong and fast setting Long-lasting bond Suitable materials: Hard plastics,
